claims.claim: Astrid needs a direct structural-integrity readout so viscosity and dissipation can distinguish healthy hardening from brittle fracture.
claims.evidence_plan: Link bridge `structural_integrity_index`/review code, Minime `ViscosityVector.structural_integrity`, and targeted structural-integrity tests.

claims.claim: High viscosity together with high dissipation can feel like grinding or ghost weight; reports should name that mismatch rather than flattening it into one score.
claims.evidence_plan: Link resonance medium cohesion/readout tests that separate cohesive, hollow, leaking, and stuck-moving states.

claims.claim: Using `coupling_coefficient` as a reactive mechanism would change live behavior rather than merely reporting contact.
claims.evidence_plan: Record an explicit no-action/authority boundary: reactive coupling requires Mike/operator approval and a rollback path.
